homepage.title: Eat Well, Live Better
homepage.subtitle: Smart nutrition for individuals and professionals
homepage.description: At Jameo Fit, we believe that good nutrition shouldn’t be complicated. Our platform connects young adults with a nutrition ecosystem where nutritionists contribute expert knowledge to train and validate AI-driven personalized plans, combining practical guidance and tracking in one digital ecosystem.
homepage.aditional_description: With technology that understands people and tools that allow specialists to feed and validate intelligent systems, we promote healthy and sustainable habits for everyone.
homepage.benefit3: Improve your well-being with professional support

hero.title: Monitor your nutrition
hero.description: Connect smart devices to monitor hydration, weight and nutrition progress from one platform.

for_you.title: What does Jameo Fit do for you?
for_you.benefit1_desc: Answer a short questionnaire and get a nutritional analysis tailored to you from the very first click. This information is used by nutrition experts to train and refine the AI system that generates your plan.
for_you.benefit2_desc: Track your progress with dynamic charts and weekly reports that speak your language. The system updates your plan based on AI-driven analysis and expert validation.
for_you.benefit3_desc: We design menus that adapt to your tastes, routine, and goals. For nutrition experts, it’s a reliable tool to validate and improve AI-generated nutritional plans.
for_you.benefit4_desc: Enjoy a flexible experience that fits your lifestyle. At the same time, professionals contribute knowledge to improve the AI that guides your journey.

user1.name: Lic. María Torres
user1.sub: I contribute my knowledge to train AI models that support more patients with better insights.

user2.name: Andrés M.
user2.sub: Seeing my daily progress motivates me and I can still eat what I like.

user3.name: Nico D.
user3.text: “The design is clean and easy to use.”
user3.sub: Everything is well organized, I find what I need in seconds.

how_it_works.title: How does it work?
how_it_works.step1: Answer a short questionnaire about your goals and preferences.
how_it_works.step2: Receive your personalized meal plan in seconds, powered by AI and validated by experts.
how_it_works.step3: Adjust and track your progress with simple and visual tools, while the system continuously improves with expert input.

cta.title: Start for free today
cta.description: Your healthy journey starts now. Connect with nutrition intelligence, get smart plans, and achieve sustainable results.
cta.qr_alt: Scan the QR code to download the app
